critical.mandate: Health checks must pass before declaring deployment successful
Metrics must be within SLO bounds
Trigger rollback if any critical check fails

step.title: Health Checks
step.action: Verify application health endpoints respond correctly
Confirm service connectivity: databases, caches, queues, external APIs
Check all containers/instances are running and healthy

step.title: Smoke Tests
step.action: Execute critical path validation: login, core feature, key user journeys
Verify API endpoints return expected responses
Check static assets and CDN serving correctly

step.title: Metric Validation
step.action: Check error rate is within SLO bounds
Verify latency (P50, P95, P99) within acceptable range
Monitor resource utilization: CPU, memory, disk

step.title: Canary Analysis
step.action: If canary deployment: compare canary vs baseline metrics
Evaluate statistical significance of metric differences

step.title: Generate Report
step.template-output: Generate post-deployment report with: health check results, smoke test results, metric comparison, canary analysis (if applicable), overall deployment status.
